title: functions.rs bag — cut destiny under decisions.md (target seats + severance)
privilege: Architect cut contract only. decisions.md is sole Spec authority — this file yields on conflict. Spec claim tags: Unconstructible / Refused / Unexposed only. Delete is an E-action, not a claim tag. Plan for TARGET state per deprecated-*.md L1 + decisions — not today's bag shape. Current paths may appear only as Delete evidence (what gets severed/removed). They must never appear as rewire destinations or living by_target seats. A rewire entry pointing into a condemned file is compatibility and voids the plan. Map seats. Census exhaustive. Folders never choose. No partial purity. Claim-tag inflation or jointly impossible meters void this plan. Allowlist ⊇ every TARGET file the meters require to change. Severance_edits may license narrowly scoped Delete-evidence edits on condemned files that must remain until a later peel; they are not living seats and not rewire destinations.

scope.this_cut: Target: OpDecl + BoundOp + bind::resolve_op + errors + ten kernels + geo; model program/expr + value/json_convert; schema column/relation coerce using model json_convert; bag tests under exec/stdlib/tests; condemned data/functions, data/expr, data/relation, data/tests/*, exec/stdlib/{functions,expr,exprs}, engines/hnsw_filter_harness Deleted. Eval half that calls resolve_op/BoundOp::apply lives in exec (never model).
scope.not_this_json: Remaining data/* peels (program, aggr, json NamedRows, data/mod.rs death with directory) and other deprecated-*.md moments — later. data/mod.rs is Delete evidence only here (dies with directory); never a by_target/rewire seat.
foundation_already_true: kyzo-model owns DataValue / ValidityTs / SourceSpan / ValidityCoerce
scope.target_not_current: by_target and allowlist.targets are target-tree paths only. Current condemned paths live solely under deletes / delete_after.

authority: docs/deprecated/deprecated-split.md — bag + data/expr + data/tests + data/mod fate (L1)
docs/deprecated/deprecated-absorbed.md — engines/hnsw_filter_harness → project/vector/ (L1; nothing rewires at condemned address)
This file — cut destiny v9; subordinate to decisions.md

claim_tags.law: Mandatory Spec tags from decisions.md only. Every unrepresentable re-tags under exactly one. Inventing a fourth tag or inflating Unexposed→Unconstructible voids this plan.
claim_tags.Unconstructible: No path through the sealed Rust type and crate boundary constructs the illegal state. Proof: private constructor + compile-fail that a crate-consumer trybuild can demonstrate. Symbol absence in our tree is not this tag.
claim_tags.Refused: Reachable program; typed runtime outcome. Named refuse variants.
claim_tags.Unexposed: Absent from the public API but reachable by a hostile adapter. Name residual risk; name real detection or state residual accepted — never costume prevention as detection.

joint_satisfaction.law: Allowlist ⊇ every TARGET file the meters require to change. A meter no allowlisted target path can satisfy voids the plan. Condemned paths are deleted via delete_after — not edited as living seats.
joint_satisfaction.proof_pairing: decisions.md §1 form: compile-fail for reverse-composition through the sealed API; grep-delete for symbols/paths.
joint_satisfaction.no_condemned_rewire: If a path is condemned in deprecated-*.md L1, it appears only under deletes/delete_after. Consumer wiring seats at L1 destiny.
joint_satisfaction.severance: severance_edits licenses narrowly scoped Delete-evidence edits on condemned files that must remain until a later peel. Meters on those edits are jointly satisfiable via allowlist.severance_edits. This is not a by_target living seat and not a rewire destination.

deletes.law: E-action ledger for condemned CURRENT paths. Never by_target seats. Never rewire destinations.
